ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: View the most recent plugin release notes.
ast.target: 查看最近的插件发布说明。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose where to save notes created from cards.
ast.target: 选择保存从卡片创建的笔记的位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Format used when creating a note from a card.
ast.target: 创建卡片笔记时使用的格式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which key combo saves/submits a card
ast.target: 选择用于保存/提交卡片的快捷键组合

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which key combo inserts a new line inside a card (does not save)
ast.target: 选择用于在卡片内插入新行的快捷键组合（不保存）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically wrap selected text or place cursor between pairs when typing (, [, {, `, =, %, or "
ast.target: Automatically wrap selected text or place cursor between pairs when typing (, [, {, `, =, %, or "

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically open the sidebar when Obsidian starts
ast.target: Obsidian 启动时自动打开侧边栏

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically archive cards when their expiry time passes
ast.target: 当到期时间过去时自动归档卡片

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a pill on cards with the remaining time until expiry.
ast.target: 在卡片上显示一个徽章，展示剩余的到期时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to display the remaining expiry time.
ast.target: 如何显示剩余的到期时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the sidecards homepage instead of the default new tab.
ast.target: 打开侧卡主页，而不是默认的新标签页。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hides the category button and separator in the homepage palette row.
ast.target: 隐藏主页调色板行中的类别按钮和分隔符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hides the color dots from the homepage.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show pinned notes in the homepage notes column.
ast.target: 在主页笔记列中显示已置顶的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show recently opened notes in the homepage notes column.
ast.target: 在主页笔记列中显示最近打开的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many recent notes to show.
ast.target: 显示多少条最近的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Place the pinned/recent notes column on the left or right.
ast.target: 将置顶/最近笔记列放置在左侧或右侧。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum width of the homepage content area in pixels. Drag to adjust.
ast.target: 主页内容区域的最大宽度（像素）。拖动以调整。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Distance from the top of the homepage to the content area, in pixels.
ast.target: 主页顶部到内容区域的距离（像素）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize how cards and the sidebar look.
ast.target: 自定义卡片和侧边栏的外观。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the transparency of the card background
ast.target: 设置卡片背景的透明度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the thickness of the card border

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the opacity of the card border and shadow color
ast.target: 设置卡片边框和阴影颜色的不透明度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the corner rounding of the card

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Limit card height in pixels (0 = no limit)
ast.target: 以像素限制卡片高度（0 = 无限制）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Padding to accommodate the status bar

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show tags grouped below card content.
ast.target: 在卡片内容下方显示分组标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 显示不带前导 # 的标签

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 在卡片上显示创建时间戳

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 在分组标签上方渲染时间戳。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 卡片出现时不淡入淡出。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide the category filter button bar.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a copy icon on card hover.
ast.target: 在卡片悬停时显示复制图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Card colors used for tagging. Names are written to notes.
ast.target: 卡片颜色用于标签。名称会写入笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show colors in 2 rows of 5 in the card menu.
ast.target: 在卡片菜单中以 2 行 5 列显示颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 配置类别显示和重新排序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which category opens when the sidebar loads.
ast.target: 侧边栏加载时打开的类别。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Cards inherit a color based on text or tag rules when no color is manually set.
ast.target: 当未手动设置颜色时，卡片会根据文本或标签规则继承颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Dropdown colors take precedence over custom unless the dropdown is set to custom.
ast.target: 除非下拉菜单设置为自定义，否则下拉颜色优先于自定义颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Drag to reorder status pills and set their sorting priority.
ast.target: 拖动以重新排序状态标签并设置其排序优先级。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, card color uses the status color
ast.target: 启用后，卡片颜色使用状态颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download all cards as a JSON file.
ast.target: 将所有卡片下载为 JSON 文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Import cards from a previously exported JSON file.
ast.target: 从先前导出的 JSON 文件导入卡片。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 自动配对括号、引号和代码

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 用主页替换默认标签页

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 卡片边框与阴影不透明度

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 输入行下方的底部间距

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Date and time format for timestamps
ast.target: 时间戳的日期时间格式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 将时间戳置于标签上方

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Two row color swatches in menu

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 导入失败：无效的 JSON 文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Set a storage folder to save your cards as notes.
ast.target: 设置存储文件夹以将卡片保存为笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This is how yours cards will look like!
ast.target: 这就是你的卡片将会呈现的样子！
